title: "Try to have another nurse with you when you prepare a high-risk medication like insulin or heparin."

events.text: This is great advice. Especially when administering a high-risk medication like insulin or heparin,[br6.363][br6.444]it never hurts to double-check with a second nurse to ensure a situation like this one doesn't happen.[br12.49][br12.571]It's important to check your facility and state policies on all high-risk medication administration.[br18.068]
